acceptance_targets: [chapter_18_prose_001] Pass if, when rereading snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:31, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:49, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:139, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:177, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:335, at least three of those entries no longer use a `smelled of` formula and instead lead with a different concrete sensory channel while preserving the same material specificity. Fail if multiple scene or character introductions still arrive through the same smell-led construction.

[chapter_18_prose_002] Pass if, in at least two of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:99, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:249, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:407, the revised text no longer uses an `It was not ... It was ...` or equivalent negative-correction pair and still lands the same meaning through direct concrete phrasing. Fail if the same self-correcting sentence shape remains in all three places.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, when rereading snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:31, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:49, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:139, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:177, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:335, at least three of those entries no longer use a `smelled of` formula and instead lead with a different concrete sensory channel while preserving the same material specificity. Fail if multiple scene or character introductions still arrive through the same smell-led construction.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly enters rooms, cars, and people through the same smell-led sentence shape. After the third or fourth instance, the material detail stops feeling chosen and starts feeling like the default descriptive engine, which flattens texture variance across an otherwise well-observed chapter.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the descriptive entries at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:3, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:31, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:49, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:139, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:177, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:335 so no more than one of those beats relies on a `smelled of` construction. Keep the class and labor specificity, but redistribute the sensory work toward touch, sound, motion, or spatial pressure in the revised lines.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, in at least two of snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:99, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:249, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:407, the revised text no longer uses an `It was not ... It was ...` or equivalent negative-correction pair and still lands the same meaning through direct concrete phrasing. Fail if the same self-correcting sentence shape remains in all three places.
findings.problem: A negation-first correction tic recurs often enough to become visible: the prose tells the reader what a feeling or object is not before naming what it is. Used once, that can sharpen judgment; repeated across the chapter, it gives the narration a self-correcting, over-authored cadence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the sentence pairs at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:99, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:249, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_18.md:407 so at least two of the three moments state the concrete judgment directly on first pass instead of using a `not this, but that` turn. Keep the meaning, but lead with the actual comparison or recognition rather than the rhetorical correction.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into asymmetry, embarrassment, appetite, and the material costs of intimacy. When an edge case appears, choose the version that preserves class pressure, erotic consequence, and bodily specificity rather than smoothing the scene into tasteful distance or soft-focus safety.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene naturally contains sexual awkwardness, bodily shame, class contempt, grief, or moral compromise, vague tasteful phrasing counts as a failed draft and must be rewritten toward concrete consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken English here; uncontracted forms should appear mainly for precision, social performance, or emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary chapter feel through scene count, dialogue density, movement versus waiting, and whether the turn comes from confrontation, discovery, aftermath, preparation, or unwanted intrusion. A nocturnal chauffeur chapter should not be followed by another chapter with the same pulse and architecture; counter hard chapters with domestic or reflective ones that still advance consequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken but exact, materially grounded, and alert to social register; imagery should emerge from labor, appetite, weather, and bodily memory rather than from decorative abstraction.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person anchored to Beni, with memory pressure and sensory bleed but no roaming omniscience.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate compressed, road-tight paragraphs with slower observational passages that let smell, touch, and silence accumulate; keep sentence music controlled rather than showy.
